description_long: This is a modern two-story house set on a landscaped lot with a driveway leading to a double garage. The exterior features a mix of white and light gray walls, large windows, and a dark gable roof over the garage section. The property is surrounded by lush green trees and shrubs, with a small gazebo visible in the backyard. The front yard includes a manicured lawn and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The house has a clean, geometric design with a combination of flat and gable roof elements, and the windows are arranged asymmetrically for a contemporary look.
description: A modern two-story house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, large windows, a double garage, and landscaped surroundings including trees and a backyard gazebo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, driveway, and manicured front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, side yard, and the gazebo in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back garden, more trees, and the rear facade of the house.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the rear elevation, backyard, and the gazebo clearly visible on the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved walkway, and no porch or columns, flanked by landscaping.
